daily.today_energy: Your intuition is absolutely glowing right now. Trust those gut feelings that pop up unexpectedly—they're basically your soul's way of texting you important intel. Lean into the mysterious vibes.
daily.love: There's a gentleness in your energy today that draws people in naturally. Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let someone see the real you without the filter.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. That project you've been sitting on? Time to show up and let your unique perspective shine. Your voice matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for some gentle movement and rest balance. Maybe a walk, some stretching, or just vibing with what actually feels good instead of what you think you *should* do. Listen to that whisper.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
